featuresOverview.title: AI-Powered Prioritisation
featuresOverview.description: Intelligently ranks your tasks based on team velocity, project impact, and deadlines, keeping everyone aligned on high-impact work.

featuresOverview.title: Capture Tasks Instantly
featuresOverview.description: Injest and parse action items instantly from Slack threads, email chains, or recorded voice memos with deep natural language parsing.

featuresOverview.title: Seamless Automation
featuresOverview.description: Configure complex multi-app triggers and dynamic actions with a zero-code visual builder that behaves exactly like a human agent.

productShowcase.title: Your Productivity, Reinvented with AI
productShowcase.description: Verve replaces fragmented task trackers and disjointed documentation with a unified, self-optimizing workspace.

capabilities.title: Contextual Task Boards
capabilities.description: Board views that adapt to your team's workflow, auto-grouping related tasks dynamically.

capabilities.title: Automated Progress Branching
capabilities.description: Sync developer git commits directly with project manager tickets to automatically update issue statuses.

capabilities.title: Natural Language Queries
capabilities.description: Ask 'What is blocking the checkout launch?' and get an instant, verified summary from your Slack and Jira.

capabilities.title: Predictive Burn-downs
capabilities.description: Verve analyzes past velocities to warn you about potential launch delays 2 weeks before they occur.

capabilities.title: Universal Knowledge Graph
capabilities.description: Connects all wiki docs, designs, and tickets into an interactive search graph that learns as you scale.

capabilities.title: Enterprise Security Controls
capabilities.description: Bank-grade data encryption, private LLM deployments, SSO, and strict role-based access configurations.

extendedFeatures.title: Velocity Tracking
extendedFeatures.description: Automatic sprint velocity calculation based on historical task completion and relative task difficulty.

extendedFeatures.title: Smart Time Ingestion
extendedFeatures.description: Log effort automatically by linking active IDE workspace, calendar appointments, and design file sessions.

extendedFeatures.title: Strategic Roadmapping
extendedFeatures.description: Formulate multi-quarter product roadmaps using AI models trained on your strategic business goals.

extendedFeatures.title: Resource Optimization
extendedFeatures.description: Identify bottlenecks and over-allocated team members before burnout happens, balancing workloads instantly.

extendedFeatures.title: Asynchronous Standups
extendedFeatures.description: Generate automated daily summaries from slack logs and code commits, cutting active meeting times by 65%.

extendedFeatures.title: Incentive Alignment
extendedFeatures.description: Reward task completions and velocity benchmarks with custom rewards that keep team morale high.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions about Verve? We have got the answers right here.

items.question: How does the AI prioritizing engine work?
items.answer: Verve's proprietary AI model analyzes tasks based on historical velocity, due dates, assignee workloads, and task descriptions. It then scores and sorts tasks dynamically to maximize project progress.

items.question: Can we import our data from Jira or Notion?
items.answer: Absolutely! Verve has built-in import wizards for Jira, Notion, Linear, Trello, and Monday.com. You can import all your tasks, attachments, comments, and historical metrics in less than 5 minutes.

items.question: Is our team's data secure with Verve?
items.answer: Security is our highest priority. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using AES-256 standard encryption. We strictly comply with SOC2, ISO 27001, and GDPR. We never use your proprietary data to train public models.

items.question: Do you offer private cloud deployments?
items.answer: Yes, for Enterprise customers we offer private VPC deployments on AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, allowing you to run Verve within your own secure network parameter.

items.question: What is the 20% yearly discount option?
items.answer: When you choose our annual billing cycle instead of monthly billing, we reduce your pricing by 20% on both our Professional and Enterprise tiers, which is applied instantly at checkout.

items.question: Is there a limit on active integrations on the Free plan?
items.answer: Yes, our Free Starter plan supports up to 3 active integrations simultaneously. To connect more of your daily tools, upgrade to our Professional plan which features unlimited active integrations.

items.question: Can I cancel or change my plan at any time?
items.answer: Yes, there are no long-term contracts. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time directly through your billing settings panel.

items.question: Do you offer custom pricing or team discounts?
items.answer: Yes, for teams with more than 100 users, we offer high-volume enterprise discounts. Contact our sales department through our contact form and we will design a plan that matches your needs.
